data.body: BLOCKER DIAGNOSED (9cf3/change 385): Verified vote runs MAIN's gerrit-verify.yaml, which INLINES the module-size gate (workflow_dispatch => uses main's workflow logic against the change's checked-out tree, NOT the change's own workflow). 385 reformatted module-size-allowlist.txt to 'path ceiling' rows, but main's OLD gate full-line comm-compares bare paths => every over-cap file reads as a 'new offender' => 385 Verified -1, and 386/387/388 inherit the reformatted allowlist so they fail too. Two bugs: (1) format bootstrap incompatibility; (2) 385 edited test.yml but the GATING vote is gerrit-verify.yaml. FIX (crossover, mirrors repo prompt-index 'green in both directions' pattern): keep module-size-allowlist.txt BARE PATHS (main old gate stays green pre-merge), add module-size-ceilings.txt ratchet, update module-size step in BOTH gerrit-verify.yaml AND test.yml to ceilings ratchet, update test_module_size_contract.py. Over-cap set identical at 385-388 (7 files); pin reconcile.py ceiling=1083 (max in stack) so piecemeal landing cannot trip ratchet. Mid-stack surgery via reset+amend+cherry-pick. Backup branch janitor-backup-pre9cf3fix.
